plugins.name: bisect
plugins.description: Git bisect to find the first bad commit by running a test command.

plugins.name: fix-all
plugins.description: Run bin/claude-review --print and automatically fix all reported issues, committing each fix individually.

plugins.name: gfix
plugins.description: Amend a commit further back in history with fixup and auto-rebase.

plugins.name: remote-diff
plugins.description: Compare local vs remote branch to detect rebase/merge mistakes.

plugins.name: review-queue
plugins.description: Ranked PR review list with dependency trees and filtered line counts.

plugins.name: standup
plugins.description: Summarize work since the last standup across your configured repos — merged PRs, reviews, authored PRs/commits, and per-repo change summary.

plugins.name: walkthrough
plugins.description: Walk through PR changes from the user's perspective.
